pages.title: Ninja Survivor
pages.description:
Navigate stealthy rooftops to evade enemies and deploy shurikens in a mission-based challenge centered on ninja skills and precision timing. Players must utilize quick reflexes to overcome wave after wave of opponents while mastering projectile throwing mechanics. The game rewards strategic use of limited tools and coherent movement through progressively difficult stages.

Key Features

• Shuriken throwing projectile system  
• Responsive rooftop navigation controls  
• Increasing enemy wave difficulty  
• Time-based survival challenges  
• Stealth-inspired ninja combat setting

pages.title: Super Ninja Balloon
pages.description:
Bounce and maneuver a nimble ninja avatar through floating platforms shaped like balloons, using precise timing to scale each level. Players activate stealth jumps and wall clings to avoid airborne hazards while collecting scattered scrolls. The gameplay centers on mastering balloon-based navigation across increasingly complex skybound stages with tricky moving targets and time limits.

Key Features

• Balloon platform traversal mechanics  
• Stealth jump and wall cling controls  
• Level progression with timed challenges  
• Collectible scrolls scoring system  
• Sky and aerial ninja theme

pages.title: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator
pages.description:
Command stealthy ninja units to defeat rival clans in tactical close-quarter combat using a mix of swordplay and shuriken throws. Progress through enemy territory by mastering timing-based attack combos and evasive maneuvers. Each level challenges players to outsmart traps and varied ninja foes, emphasizing precision and quick reflexes.

Key Features

• Timing-based combat combos  
• Stealth and evasion controls  
• Progressive enemy AI difficulty  
• Unlockable weapon upgrade paths  
• Feudal Japan-inspired environments

pages.title: Aim Ninja
pages.description:

Players master an aiming mechanic where accuracy and speed determine success, progressing through increasingly difficult target patterns. The game tests hand-eye coordination with multiple difficulty levels that gradually sharpen ninja throwing skills.

Key Features

• Precision shuriken throwing mechanic

Players navigate precise timing jumps and wall runs to avoid traps and reach the end of each stage, testing agility and reflexes with increasing difficulty. Speed and accuracy are key to mastering these vertical challenges.
